title: PhantomXD Priviate Pack
description: “PhantomXD_Storm (Private) – lightweight, fast, and tailored for PvP SMP battles in Minecraft.”
body:
⚔️ Private PvP Texture Pack ⚔️
A clean, competitive pack made for smooth crystal PvP and sharp visuals.

✨ Features:

🔥 Low fire for perfect fight clarity

💎 3D crystal models for better placement visibility

🍖 Small food items to keep the screen clear

🗡️ Better sword designs for precision combat

🛡️ Side shield & transparent HUD for max visibility

🎞️ Custom animations for a polished PvP feel

Built for players who want speed, visibility, and style all in one private pack.
